QW-452  TEST SPECIMENS — TYPE AND NUMBER. (a) The type and number of test specimens shall be as required by the tables of this paragraph. (b) Specimen locations and orientations shall be as described in the applicable figures. (c) Specimens shall be machined to the dimensions specified herein. Bend and tension test specimens shall meet the requirements of QW-150. For thickness limits qualified, see QW-451. See also QW-160 for the types of tests required, except as permitted by QW-190 for alternative examinations. Specimen preparation for impact testing, when required, shall comply with UCS-57.
